summary: Context Managers implement `__enter__` and `__exit__` (or `@contextmanager`). Guarantee resource cleanup.
oneLineSummary: Context managers automate resource allocation and guaranteed cleanup.

memoryTricks.trick: Context Manager = Automatic Door: opens when you enter, closes when you leave.

nextTopics.title: Modules & Packages
nextTopics.whyNext: Organize code into modular Python packages.
